subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! The spiritual verses were read, and the matchless ode was chanted. That pure devotion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الهی مثنوی روحانی قرائت شد و غزل بی بدل تلاوت گردید آن تبتل و
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
